envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Capability packs bundle related premium capabilities into purchasable units. Entitlement makes availability; Foundation governance still authorizes activation. Advanced memory governance is a premium pack; basic memory safety is NOT a pack — it is baseline.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: When a Twin or Admin references a capability pack, treat it as availability information only. Activation requires Foundation governance approval + map-region approval. Never autonomous activation.

items.name: Dandelion Activation Pack
items.description: Activates the 6-stage Dandelion maturity flow (A Preview -> F Activation) per ADR-0082 + Amendment 1. Cartographer doctrine: Dandelion maps the territory; admins approve the map; Foundation governs what can happen inside the map.
items.human_readable_summary: Dandelion Activation Pack. Unlocks the Dandelion org-seeding + cartographer flow. Entitlement enables availability; admin approval + map-region approval still required for every region.
items.model_usage_notes: Use Dandelion outputs to inform org seeding + Map authorship. Map regions activate only after admin approval per ADR-0082 Amendment 1. Never autonomous Map mutation.
items.governance_notes: Dandelion entitlement does not authorize org-wide intelligence collection. Cartographer doctrine + RULE 20-protected forbidden surveillance language remain absolute.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: dandelion-activation. Included in Business + Enterprise plans. Final pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Existing approved Maps preserved as read-only; new Map mutations stop.

items.name: Workflow Automation Pack
items.description: Per ADR-0081 5-stage workflow maturity. Pack entitles availability of Stages 3-5 (proposed Action -> governed execution -> continuous optimization). Stages 1-2 (template + recommendation) are baseline.
items.human_readable_summary: Workflow Automation Pack. Unlocks proposed-action + governed execution + continuous optimization. Stages 1-2 (template + recommendation) are baseline and never paywalled.
items.model_usage_notes: Workflow pack entitlement does not auto-execute workflows. Foundation governance still authorizes every execution. Dual-control for risky writes still applies.
items.governance_notes: Workflow execution remains Foundation-governed. Pack entitlement does not relax approval discipline. Per-call governance still applies.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: workflow-automation. Included in Business + Enterprise plans. Final pricing product-team-decided.
audit_expectations: all workflow executions audited via existing ACTION_* lineage
items.upgrade_path: workflow-automation -> bundled in Enterprise + advanced-audit pack
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. New executions stop; in-flight execution windows close gracefully; audit preserved.

items.name: Advanced Audit / Compliance Pack
items.description: Extends baseline audit with advanced audit views, cross-scope verify-chain, evidence packaging, regulator-view per ADR-0036 LawfulBasis when applicable. Baseline audit remains in all plans.
items.human_readable_summary: Advanced Audit / Compliance Pack. Cross-scope verify-chain + advanced audit views + evidence packaging. Baseline audit is never paywalled.
items.model_usage_notes: Advanced audit pack does not relax retention; it extends visibility. Never claim guaranteed compliance or regulator approval.
items.governance_notes: Baseline audit chain integrity is never paywalled. Advanced pack extends views; legal retention is never reduced by downgrade.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: advanced-audit-compliance. Included in Business + Enterprise. Final pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Advanced views revoked; baseline audit + retention preserved absolutely.

items.name: DMW / Memory Governance Pack
items.description: Advanced DMW memory governance (custom retention extensions, advanced scope rules, regulated deletion variants, capsule provenance, cross-org lawful-basis composition). BASELINE DMW is included in every plan outside this pack.
items.human_readable_summary: DMW / Memory Governance Pack. Advanced governance only. Baseline DMW memory safety is NEVER in this pack — it is included in every plan. Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.
items.model_usage_notes: Advanced DMW governance never relaxes baseline safety. Baseline scope discipline + revocability + audit are always-on regardless of pack.
items.governance_notes: RULE 0 sovereignty is never paywalled. Advanced retention extensions and custom scope rules are governance-bounded. Downgrade preserves baseline DMW safety absolutely.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: dmw-memory-governance. Included in Business + Enterprise. Final pricing product-team-decided. Baseline DMW memory safety is NEVER sold separately; the wallet is foundational trust infrastructure.
items.upgrade_path: dmw-memory-governance -> bundled in Enterprise + custom-retention add-on
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Advanced extensions revoked; baseline DMW memory safety preserved absolutely. Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.

items.name: Agent Playground / Simulation Pack
items.description: Per ADR-0077 + Section 5 Wave 9/10. Multi-agent simulation orchestration + enterprise decision cockpit. Section 5 Foundation backend LIVE; pack entitles availability of the consumer surface.
items.human_readable_summary: Agent Playground / Simulation Pack. Multi-agent simulation + enterprise decision cockpit per ADR-0077 + Section 5 Wave 9/10.
items.model_usage_notes: Simulation is decision-supporting; never an autonomous Action. All simulations honor closed-vocab projection + execution-boundary three-state lifecycle per ADR-0077.
items.governance_notes: Simulation surfaces inherit Foundation governance: no chain-of-thought leakage, no hierarchy claim, no Execute button in simulation panel. Honesty postures absolute.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: agent-playground-simulation. Included in Business + Enterprise. Final pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. New simulations stop; historical scenarios preserved per audit retention.

items.name: Enterprise Analytics Pack
items.description: Per ADR-0061 Section 6 Wave 6 + Wave 7. Live aggregates (action-runtime health, compliance posture, etc.) at org tier; metadata-only aggregates; no raw employee inspection.
items.human_readable_summary: Enterprise Analytics Pack. Org-level governed aggregates per ADR-0061 + Section 6. Metadata-only; no employee scoring; no manager surveillance.
items.model_usage_notes: Aggregates surface metadata + posture indicators only. Never employee scoring, never manager surveillance, never psychological profiling.
items.governance_notes: Aggregates are summaries, not raw data. Forbidden inferences are absolute. Per-employee inspection is not in this pack.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: enterprise-analytics. Included in Enterprise + available as add-on. Final pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. New aggregate views revoked; historical views per retention.

items.name: Regulator / Evidence Pack
items.description: Regulator-ready evidence packaging per ADR-0070 doctrine + ADR-0036 LawfulBasis + ADR-0071 cross-scope verify-chain.
items.human_readable_summary: Regulator / Evidence Pack. Examination-ready by default. LawfulBasis-gated regulator view. Cross-scope verify-chain. Never claim guaranteed compliance.
items.model_usage_notes: Regulator-readiness is a substrate posture, never a certification claim. Examination-ready substrate is delivered; final regulator acceptance is the regulator's call.
items.governance_notes: Neutral compliance vocabulary mandatory per ADR-0070. No claim of guaranteed compliance or regulator approval. LawfulBasis 9-condition enforcement per ADR-0036.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: regulator-evidence. Included in Enterprise + custom add-on. Final pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Audit + LawfulBasis history preserved absolutely.

items.name: Premium Support / Onboarding Pack
items.description: Premium support + premium onboarding services. Not a product capability; a services entitlement.
items.human_readable_summary: Premium Support / Onboarding Pack. Premium support + premium onboarding. Services entitlement.
items.model_usage_notes: This pack does not change product capability; it changes support availability + onboarding services.
items.governance_notes: Support services operate within tenant boundary. No support engagement bypasses Foundation governance, audit, or DMW scope.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: premium-support-onboarding. Included in Business + Enterprise. Final pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Service tier revoked; audit + boundary preserved.

items.name: Collaboration Pack (candidate)
items.description: Connector pack candidate for Team plan. Bundles Collaboration connector pack family (Slack / Teams / Gmail / Outlook / Calendars). Activation per ADR-0084 per-connector RULE 21 research arc.
items.human_readable_summary: Collaboration Pack candidate. Bundles Collaboration connector family per ADR-0084. Entitlement makes the pack available; Foundation governance + map-region approval still required for activation.
items.model_usage_notes: Collaboration pack entitlement does not auto-activate Slack / Teams / Gmail / Outlook / Calendars. Each connector requires its own activation per ADR-0084 + per-connector RULE 21 research arc.
items.governance_notes: Connector activation gated. Read-first by default; write actions disabled by default; risky writes dual-control. No secrets exposed.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: collaboration-pack-candidate. Candidate for Team plan inclusion. Final pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Connector reads stop; audit + retention preserved.
